sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73953" key="o)mfa/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμφᾰ´λ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73953.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a boss, bossy,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὀ. σάκεος τρύφος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.84</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
